checks.name: Production build
checks.details: npm run build completed successfully and generated all Songs detail routes.

visual_checks.name: Mobile chord offset 10
visual_checks.details: At 390x844 the rendered score reports chord vertical offset 10. Plain, extended, superscripted, and slash chords sit close to the staff without line collisions. Evidence: evidence/after-mobile-chord-offset-10.png.

visual_checks.name: Mobile layout regression
visual_checks.details: The page retains four bars per system, no horizontal overflow, no framework overlay, and no console errors.
